ddls:
CREATE TABLE "businesses" (
  "business_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the business recipient */,
  "business_type" INTEGER /* ID of the business type */,
  "naics_code" INTEGER /* NAICS code representing the business industry */,
  "industry_2" INTEGER /* ID of the secondary industry classification */,
  "industry_3" TEXT /* Tertiary industry classification */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Description of the main industry */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race and ethnicity of the business owner */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the business owner */,
  "veteran_status" TEXT /* Veteran status of the business owner */,
  "non_profit" TEXT /* Indicates if the business is a non-profit */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the business */,
  "city" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "zcta" INTEGER /* ZCTA code */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standards code */,
  "county" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "cbsa" TEXT /* Core-Based Statistical Area code */,
  "msa" TEXT /* Metropolitan Statistical Area */,
  "cd_region" TEXT /* Community Development Region */,
  "jobs_created" INTEGER /* Number of jobs created through the assistance */,
  "amount_assisted" TEXT /* Total amount of financial assistance received in dollars */,
  "loans_count" INTEGER /* Count of loans received by the business */,
  "date_of_application" TEXT /* Date when the business applied for financial assistance */,
  "date_of_approval" TEXT /* Date when the financial assistance was approved */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application */,
  "business_website" TEXT /* URL of the business's website */,
  "business_email" TEXT /* Email address of the business */,
  "business_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the business */,
  "establishment_year" INTEGER /* Year when the business was established */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the business */,
  "business_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("business_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_business_type FOREIGN KEY ("business_type") REFERENCES business_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_naics_code FOREIGN KEY ("naics_code") REFERENCES naics_codes ("naics_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_county FOREIGN KEY ("county") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_zcta FOREIGN KEY ("zcta") REFERENCES zcta ("zcta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_industry_2 FOREIGN KEY ("industry_2") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_cd_region FOREIGN KEY ("cd_region") REFERENCES cd_region ("cd_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_msa FOREIGN KEY ("msa") REFERENCES msa ("msa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_businesses_cbsa FOREIGN KEY ("cbsa") REFERENCES cbsa ("cbsa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the business type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business type */,
  "legal_structure" TEXT /* Legal structure of the business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "naics_codes" (
  "naics_code" INTEGER /* NAICS code for the business */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the NAICS code */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Major sector of the industry */,
  "industry_subsector" TEXT /* Subsector of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("naics_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the major sector to which the industry belongs */,
  "subsector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subsector to which the industry belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "county_population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "county_area" TEXT /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the city is located */,
  "city_population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "city_area" TEXT /* Area of the city in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zcta" (
  "zcta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ZCTA */,
  "zcta_code" TEXT /* ZCTA code */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city associated with the ZCTA */,
  "zcta_population" INTEGER /* Population of the ZCTA */,
  "zcta_area" TEXT /* Area of the ZCTA in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zcta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cbsa" (
  "cbsa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CBSA */,
  "cbsa_code" TEXT /* CBSA code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the CBSA */,
  "cbsa_population" INTEGER /* Population of the CBSA */,
  "cbsa_area" TEXT /* Area of the CBSA in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cbsa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "msa" (
  "msa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MSA */,
  "msa_code" TEXT /* MSA code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the MSA */,
  "msa_population" INTEGER /* Population of the MSA */,
  "msa_area" TEXT /* Area of the MSA in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("msa_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cd_region" (
  "cd_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community development region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the community development region */,
  "region_population" INTEGER /* Population of the community development region */,
  "region_area" TEXT /* Area of the community development region in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cd_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of funding source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the funding source */,
  "source_website" TEXT /* URL of the funding source's website */,
  "source_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the funding source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_details" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "business_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business receiving the loan */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding source providing the loan */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the loan */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "term_years" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in years */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application for the loan */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was disbursed */,
  "repayment_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for loan repayment */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment made */,
  "next_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next payment due */,
  "remaining_balance" TEXT /* Remaining balance of the loan */,
  "guarantee_amount" TEXT /* Amount guaranteed by a third party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_details_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES funding_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_details_business_id FOREIGN KEY ("business_id") REFERENCES businesses ("business_id")
)
